items.title: Mission
items.desc: A self-hostable URL shortener that small teams can stand up on their own domain in an afternoon. Bring-your-own-domain, real analytics, no third party tracking your users.

items.title: Audience
items.desc: Small teams (3-50 people) who already own a short domain and want to use it for campaign tracking, internal redirects, and link-shortening without handing data to a SaaS.

items.title: Hard constraints
items.desc: One static binary. One config file. Must run on a $5/month VPS with 1 GB RAM. No SaaS dependencies for the redirect path — even if every other service is down, slugs still resolve.
